title: Puerto Banus sunset cruise: private yacht charter costs & tips 2026
html:
Puerto Banus, the glamorous marina on the Costa del Sol, is the perfect departure point for a private sunset yacht charter. An evening cruise past the mansions of the Golden Mile and into the Mediterranean typically costs from €1,500 for a small group. For an authentic experience, you can find a skippered charter through BoatHire24, which connects you with local owners and licensed captains.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

The main departure point is Puerto Banus Marina, also known as Puerto José Banús, a purpose-built port with over 900 berths. Many skippers also collect guests from the adjacent Puerto Deportivo. Further east, the small port of La Bajadilla in Marbella is an alternative. For longer cruises, a stop at Cabopino Harbour or the sandy beaches of San Pedro de Alcántara is common. To the south, you can anchor off the coast of Estepona, a pretty whitewashed town. You can find a skippered charter in a few minutes.

Which boat to rent for a sunset cruise

  1. Motor yacht, best for speed and a smooth ride; ideal for 8, 12 guests; from €2,000 for three hours.
  2. Sailing catamaran, best for space and stability; good for 10, 15 guests; from €1,800 for four hours.
  3. Luxury flybridge, best for panoramic views and entertaining; holds 6, 10 guests; from €3,000 for four hours.
  4. RIB or open speedboat, best for thrill-seekers and small groups; 4, 6 guests; from €900 for two hours.
  5. Classic sailing yacht, best for a traditional experience; 6, 8 guests; from €1,600 for three hours.

How much does it cost to rent a private boat in Puerto Banus?

Prices for a private sunset charter start from around €900 and can exceed €5,000 for a superyacht-grade vessel. The exact cost depends on the boat size, trip duration, and whether you choose a crewed or self-drive option. For a well-equipped option like the Azimut 58, you can check this motor yacht on BoatHire24 to see exact availability. One option worth a look is this motor yacht.

  • Shared sunset tour (on a large catamaran with other guests): from €70 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (private, up to 6 guests): from €900
  • Catamaran full-day (private, up to 12 guests): from €2,500
  • Crewed luxury yacht (private, flybridge, up to 10 guests): from €4,000

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

For most private charters with a captain, no licence is required; if you wish to self-drive, you need a valid ICC or equivalent. Spain recognises the International Certificate of Competence, and local operators will confirm the exact requirements for your nationality. The high season in Puerto Banus runs from June to September, when the Poniente wind often picks up by late afternoon, so a sunset cruise can be slightly breezy. You can also see more at browse the listings.

If you join a sunset charter in August, book a 19:00 departure to catch the golden hour as the sun dips behind the Sierra Blanca mountains; the light is spectacular.

At a glance

  • Price range: €900, €5,000 for private sunset charter
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: 2, 4 hours typical
  • Capacity: 4, 15 guests depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

What is the best time for a sunset cruise?

Late evening, from 19:00 to 21:00 in summer, offers the best light and temperatures.

Can I host a private event on a charter?

Yes, most boats allow celebrations with advance notice and a small additional fee for catering.

Are there any hidden fees I should know about?

Standard charters include fuel and crew, but berthing fees at Puerto Banus marina are sometimes extra for longer stays.

What happens if the weather is poor on the day?

Reputable operators will cancel or reschedule for safety, often with a full refund or credit.

A private sunset yacht charter from Puerto Banus is a memorable way to experience the Costa del Sol in 2026. Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
